title: equisetum palustre f. microstachyum
intro: Equisetum palustre f. microstachyum, also known as dwarf marsh horsetail, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the horsetail family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Equisetum palustre f. microstachyum include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as supporting the urinary and respiratory systems. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
